definitions.text: A common, firm, round fruit produced by a tree of the genus Malus.
examples: custard apple rose apple thorn apple

definitions.text: The fruit of the tree Malus domestica, chiefly with a green, red, or yellow skin, cultivated in temperate climates for cidermaking, cooking, and eating. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
To make (something) appear like an apple (noun sense 1.1).
To become like an apple. To collect fir-cones. Of a flower bud or vegetable (especially a root vegetable): to grow into the shape of an apple.
